mug.name: Mug
mug.description: Setup/Builder: A quick strike intended for theft. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Greed Pip.

sand_in_eyes.name: Sand in Eyes
sand_in_eyes.description: Setup: Throw sand to blind your foe. Generates 1 Greed Pip and applies [Blinded].

final_heist.name: Final Heist
final_heist.description: Payoff: A massive payout strike. Consumes 5 Greed Pips to deal Physical damage. If the target is below 20% HP, deal triple damage.

cheap_shot.name: Cheap Shot
cheap_shot.description: Payoff: Strike where it hurts. Consumes 3 Greed Pips to deal damage and apply [Maimed].

thief_reflexes.name: Thief Reflexes
thief_reflexes.description: Defense: A scoundrel's intuition. Increases Evasion by 40% and grants 10% chance to steal a random item when hit.

dirty_trick.name: Dirty Trick
dirty_trick.description: Defense/Disruption: Trip the target. Applies [Prone] for 3 ticks.

pickpocket_dash.name: Pickpocket Dash
pickpocket_dash.description: Mobility: Move quickly through groups, stealing small amounts of Stamina from each entity passed.

stealth.name: Stealth
stealth.description: Utility/Signature: Become a shadow. Grants [Concealed] for 20 ticks. This version of concealment is not broken by movement.

thief_physiology.name: Thief Physiology
thief_physiology.description: Passive: Scoundrel's Luck. You gain 10% increased loot from mobs and your Dirty Trick has no cooldown if it misses.
